events.title: Drum Tao: The Best

events.title: Théotime Langlois de Swarte, violin and Justin Taylor, harpsichord
events.description: Théotime Langlois de Swarte and Justin Taylor perform a program of Baroque showpieces.

events.title: David Finckel, cello and Wu Han, piano
events.description: David Finckel and Wu Han perform a program of chamber music.

events.title: Chamber Chorus, University Chorus, UCBSO: Verdi, Requiem
events.description: The UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus and UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra perform Verdi's Requiem.

events.title: Tacet(i) Ensemble Public Concert
events.location: Wu Performance Hall (Morrison Hall, Room 125), Berkeley, CA
events.description: A concert featuring new works by Tianyu Zou, Pablo Teutli, Claire Hu, Jenny Xiong, Wai Hin Ko, and Josiah Adrineda.

events.title: Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater
events.description: The acclaimed Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater performs.

events.title: Jordi Savall; La Capella Reial de Catalunya and Hespèrion XXI
events.description: Jordi Savall, La Capella Reial de Catalunya, and Hespèrion XXI present 'Songs, Battles, and Dances from the Old and the New World (1100–1780)'.

events.title: Alexandre Kantorow, piano
events.description: French pianist Alexandre Kantorow makes his Cal Performances debut with works by Bach, Chopin, Beethoven, Scriabin, and Medtner.

events.title: The Tallis Scholars: Mysteries and Miracles
events.description: The Tallis Scholars perform an Easter season program inspired by events in the biblical story of Jesus' life.

events.title: Víkingur Ólafsson, piano: Opus 109
events.description: Artist in Residence pianist Víkingur Ólafsson returns with a recital featuring Beethoven's Opus 109, Bach, and Schubert.

events.description: A performance showcasing the work of the Berkeley Dance Project.

events.title: Renée Fleming, soprano; Inon Barnatan, piano
events.description: Grammy-winning soprano Renée Fleming and pianist Inon Barnatan perform a program of beloved songs, arias, and piano showpieces.

events.title: Lara Downes and Friends: This Land: Reflections on America
events.description: Classical pianist Lara Downes and collaborators explore the richness and complexity of the American experience through music.

events.title: California Legislature: Previewing the Year Ahead in California State Housing Policy
events.description: A seminar previewing the upcoming year in California state housing policy.

events.title: Bate-Papo

events.description: A curator-led tour of the 'Rhapsody' exhibition.

events.description: A conversation about contemporary Chile with Javiera Manzi Araneda and Claudio Alvarado Lincopi.

events.title: Louise Mozingo | Public Land, Public Space, Public Discourse
events.description: A lecture by Louise Mozingo on public land, space, and discourse.

events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Public Health
events.description: The inaugural annual lecture by Dr. John Swartzberg.

events.title: A Writing Workshop with Andrea Paluch
events.description: A writing workshop led by Andrea Paluch.

events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A seminar on aerospace topics.
